titleStmt.title: SII 40.363: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 363. (A.R. No. 175 of 1934.) Chārāla, Punganur Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: Round the cornice of the central shrine in the Kāśī Viśvēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1662, Durmati, Vaiśākha, śu. 5.

Records the construction of the temple and consecration of the image of Kāśī Viśvēśvara and also gift of lands for conducting worship by Raṅgāreḍḍi, son of Bayyāreḍḍi and Akkamma and grandson of Suṇṇā-reḍḍi. Further it records the gift of land to the temple by Immadi Chikarāya-Mahāprabu of Sugutūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu Avighnamastu . śrīkāśīviśvēśvara . svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1662 Agunaniyaṭi durmatināma saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 5 śubhadinamu . cārālasthaḷaṁ merusu vaṁśōdbhavulaina satyavarāyala gōtrapavitṛlaina suṁṇāreḍḍigāri pautṛlaina bayyāreḍḍigāri dharmapatniyagu śivāḍi mallepa tiṁmmireḍḍi komārtte Ayina Akkaṁmma putṛḍaina raṁgāreḍḍigāru dēvālayamu kaṭṭiṁcci śrīvārini pratiṣṭhacēyiṁcunappuḍu . polāna cenu kha 1 cervuna maḍi sthaḷālu 2 ki maḍi kha 1 samarpaṇa ceśināru . rudrābhiṣēka sahasranāmārccana maṁtrapuṣpānaku
śrī kāśīviśvēśvarasvāmivāriki . śrīmaṁnmahārājarāja śrī suguṭūru yiṁmmaḍi cikkarāyamahā prabhuvulavāralakki dharmapeṭavugānu mahāprabhuvula dīpārādhana Arccanā paṁgānu
rāmābhaṭluvārikicēnu kha . maḍi kha . 1 śalavu dayaceśināru madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpālavaṁśajāvā yō bhūmi dharmacitāḥ madharmayeva satātaṁ pālapādadvayamahaṁ śirasāvahāmi .
Digital edition of SII 40.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
